---
name: New pattern request
about: Propose a new AI security pattern to add to the repository
title: "[Pattern Request] <pattern name>"
labels: enhancement
---

## Pattern idea

What security problem does this pattern solve?

## Why this matters

What’s the real-world risk or incident class this addresses?

## Expected deliverables

- [ ] Pattern markdown (v1.0)
- [ ] Threat model / non-goals
- [ ] Implementation guidance
- [ ] References / prior art
